positive: A symmetrical, stylized illustration of bioluminescent forest flora and fauna. Feature large, clean silhouette shapes of exotic mushrooms, crescent moons, and abstract vines interwoven with subtle geometric mandalas. The color palette should be deep indigo, sapphire blue, ethereal teal, and glowing emerald green, against a clean, dark background. The style should mimic highly detailed, vector-based graphic art with strong line work and negative space. Central composition, highly graphic, high contrast, suitable for a seamless repeat pattern, minimalist yet complex, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, messy, photographic, low detail, gradient, text, watermark, logo, signature, repeating patterns (unless desired), noise, poor anatomy, artifacts, artifacts, out of focus, ugly, amateur
